metadata.title: profile
metadata.description: Coordinate a Java profiling lifecycle from reproducible baseline through evidence-backed optimization verification.

command.goal:
Coordinate a Java profiling lifecycle from reproducible baseline through evidence-backed optimization verification.
## Usage
/profile <application-or-module> [issue|plan|openspec-change|suspected-problem] [runtime-command] [workload]
## Accepted inputs
- Application, module, or repository path - Optional issue, implementation plan, OpenSpec change, or suspected performance problem - Runtime command and representative workload - Optional existing baseline or profiling artifacts
## Owner and skills
- Owner: `@robot-java-performance` - Associated skills: `@161-java-profiling-detect`, `@162-java-profiling-analyze`, `@163-java-profiling-refactor`, and `@164-java-profiling-verify`

step.step-content: Collect profiling evidence and analyze hotspots.
Ask approval before selecting optimization target.
Delegate implementation and verify equivalent measurements.

safeguards-list.safeguards-item: Do not optimize without user approval.
Do not claim improvement from non-equivalent measurements.
Do not let robot-java-performance implement application code changes directly.
